code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Logistics_DeliveryRoute] --> Initializing: start_link(Logistics_Warehouse)

    state Initializing {Logistics_Warehouse] --> LoadConfig
        LoadConfig --> InitTransport
        InitTransport --> EstablishConnection
        EstablishConnection --> SendInitialize
        SendInitialize --> WaitForInitialized
        WaitForInitialized --> [Logistics_TrackingNumber]
    }

    Initializing --> Connected: initialized received

    state Connected {Logistics_Warehouse] --> Active

        Active --> ResourceOperations: list/read/subscribe
        Active --> ToolOperations: call_tool
        Active --> PromptOperations: list/get

        ResourceOperations --> Active
        ToolOperations --> Active
        PromptOperations --> Active

        Active --> Subscribing: subscribe_resource
        Subscribing --> Active: subscription_confirmed
    }

    Connected --> Paused: pause_requested
    Paused --> Connected: resume_requested

    Connected --> Reconnecting: transport_error
    Reconnecting --> Connected: reconnect_success
    Reconnecting --> Failed: reconnect_failed(Logistics_FleetManagement)

    Connected --> GracefulShutdown: shutdown notification
    GracefulShutdown --> [Logistics_StockLevel]: cleanup_complete

    Connected --> AbnormalShutdown: critical_error
    AbnormalShutdown --> [Logistics_TrackingNumber]: cleanup_complete

    %% Session Backend Transitions
    note right of Connected
        Session Persistence:
        - ETS: In-memory
        - DETS: Disk-based
        - Mnesia: Cluster
    end note

    %% Reconnection Strategy
    state Reconnecting {Logistics_DeliveryRoute] --> Backoff
        Backoff --> ReconnectAttempt
        ReconnectAttempt --> Success
        ReconnectAttempt --> Failure

        Success --> [Logistics_StockLevel]
        Failure --> IncrementRetryCount
        IncrementRetryCount --> CheckMaxRetries

        CheckMaxRetries --> Backoff: below_max
        CheckMaxRetries --> [Logistics_FleetManagement]: exceeded_max
    }

    %% State Transition Details
    Connected --> SessionValidation: periodic_health_check
    SessionValidation --> Connected: healthy
    SessionValidation --> Failed: unhealthy(Logistics_DeliveryRoute)

    %% Session Restoration (Logistics_StockLevel)
    note right of Reconnecting
        Failover Modes:
        - Local: Restart process
        - Remote: Mnesia replica
        - Recovery: Load from DETS
    end note

    %% Subscription Management
    state Subscribing {Logistics_FleetManagement] --> RegisterSubscription
        RegisterSubscription --> SetupWatcher
        SetupWatcher --> ConfirmSubscription
        ConfirmSubscription --> [Logistics_StockLevel]
    }

    %% Cleanup on Shutdown
    state GracefulShutdown {Logistics_TrackingNumber] --> UnsubscribeResources
        UnsubscribeResources --> DrainPendingRequests
        DrainPendingRequests --> CloseTransport
        CloseTransport --> PersistSession
        PersistSession --> TerminateProcess
        TerminateProcess --> [Logistics_DeliveryRoute]
    }

    %% Error States
    state AbnormalShutdown {Logistics_StockLevel] --> LogError
        LogError --> PersistCrashDump
        PersistCrashDump --> NotifyDependents
        NotifyDependents --> TerminateProcess
        TerminateProcess --> [Logistics_StockLevel]
    }

    %% Session State Fields
    note right of Connected
        Session State:
        - session_id: UUID
        - transport_pid: PID
        - pending_requests: map(Logistics_StockLevel)
        - subscriptions: map(Logistics_DeliveryRoute)
        - capabilities: #capabilities{Logistics_StockLevel}
        - last_activity: timestamp(Logistics_TrackingNumber)
        - backend: ets | dets | mnesia
    end note

    %% Activity Monitoring
    Connected --> IdleTimeout: no_activity(Logistics_FleetManagement)
    IdleTimeout --> [Logistics_DeliveryRoute]: session_expired

    %% Rate Limiting
    Connected --> RateLimited: request_rate_exceeded
    RateLimited --> Connected: backoff_complete
    RateLimited --> Failed: rate_limit_persistent

    %% Resource Watcher Lifecycle
    state ResourceOperations {Logistics_FleetManagement] --> Watching
        Watching --> NotificationReceived: resource_changed
        NotificationReceived --> DeliverNotification
        DeliverNotification --> Watching
    }

    %% Tool Execution Lifecycle
    state ToolOperations {Logistics_DeliveryRoute] --> Executing
        Executing --> InProgress: long_running_op
        InProgress --> ProgressUpdate: send_progress
        ProgressUpdate --> InProgress
        InProgress --> Complete: finished
        Complete --> [Logistics_TrackingNumber]
    }

    %% Session Backend Selection
    note left of Initializing
        Backend Selection:
        {Logistics_DeliveryRoute}
        - Fastest: O(Logistics_Warehouse) access
        - Volatile: Lost on crash

        {Logistics_Warehouse}
        - Durable: Disk persistence
        - Slower: I/O overhead

        {Logistics_StockLevel}
        - Distributed: Cluster sync
        - CAP: Consistency trade-offs
    end note

    %% Health Check States
    Connected --> HealthCheck: periodic_timer
    HealthCheck --> Connected: all_systems_go
    HealthCheck --> Degraded: subsystem_failure
    Degraded --> Connected: recovery_complete
    Degraded --> Failed: recovery_failed

    %% Session Restoration Flow
    note right of Reconnecting
        Restoration Priority:
        1. Restore subscriptions
        2. Replay pending requests
        3. Restore capabilities
        4. Resume monitoring
    end note
repo_description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) SDK for Erlang
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为物流系统画一个状态图，核心是DeliveryRoute的生命周期管理。从Warehouse启动开始，到最终的各种终止状态。
明白。所以起点是Logistics_Warehouse触发start_link，然后进入Initializing状态？这个初始化阶段需要细化吗？
需要细化。Initializing里面要有LoadConfig、InitTransport、EstablishConnection这几个步骤，最后发送初始化消息并等待确认，拿到TrackingNumber才算完成。
好的，Initializing复合状态已经画好了，包含这五个内部步骤。当收到initialized消息后，应该进入Connected状态对吧？
对，Connected是核心运行状态。里面要有Active状态，然后Active分出三条操作线：ResourceOperations、ToolOperations、PromptOperations。
这三条操作线都是Active的子状态吗？还是并行的行为？
是并行的行为模式。Active可以进入任意一种操作，操作完成后都回到Active。另外还要有个Subscribing状态，专门处理资源订阅。
Connected复合状态已添加，包含Active和Subscribing。三条操作线都画了双向箭头回到Active，Subscribing确认后也回到Active。
Connected状态还需要能暂停和恢复。pause_requested转到Paused，resume_requested再回到Connected。
暂停机制加上了。那网络异常怎么处理？应该有重连逻辑吧。
对，transport_error触发Reconnecting状态。重连成功回Connected，失败则进入Failed状态，并记录到FleetManagement。
Reconnecting应该也是个复合状态吧？需要包含退避策略和重试计数。
没错。Backoff之后尝试重连，成功的话到StockLevel，失败则增加计数，检查是否超过最大重试次数。没超过继续退避，超过了就进Failed。
Reconnecting复合状态已完成，包含完整的退避和重试逻辑。我注意到有两个终止路径，都用方括号标注了。
还需要两种关闭方式。GracefulShutdown是正常关闭，AbnormalShutdown是异常关闭。前者从shutdown notification触发，后者从critical_error触发。
这两个关闭状态都需要细化内部步骤吗？
都需要。GracefulShutdown要依次执行：取消订阅、排空请求、关闭传输、持久化会话、终止进程，最后回到DeliveryRoute。AbnormalShutdown则是记录错误、保存崩溃转储、通知依赖方、终止进程，回到StockLevel。
两种关闭流程都画好了。另外我想在Connected旁边加个注释，说明会话持久化的三种后端：ETS内存、DETS磁盘、Mnesia集群。
很好，这个注释很重要。Initializer那边也加一个后端选择的注释，对比三种方案的优缺点。
Initializer左侧的注释已添加，说明了DeliveryRoute最快但易失、Warehouse持久但有IO开销、StockLevel分布式但有CAP权衡。
还需要健康检查机制。Connected可以进入SessionValidation，健康就保持，不健康且无法恢复就进Failed。
健康检查加上了。Reconnecting旁边也加个注释说明故障恢复模式吧？
对，加上Failover Modes：本地重启进程、远程Mnesia副本、从DETS恢复。还有恢复优先级：先恢复订阅，再重放请求，然后恢复能力，最后恢复监控。
Reconnecting的两个注释都加好了。Subscribing状态需要细化吗？
需要，Subscribing是个复合状态。从FleetManagement开始，注册订阅、设置观察者、确认订阅，最后到StockLevel。
Subscribing复合状态已完成。现在ResourceOperations也需要细化内部流程吧？
对，ResourceOperations里要有Watching状态，资源变化时收到通知，然后投递通知，再回到Watching。这是从FleetManagement开始的。
ResourceOperations的观察者生命周期已添加。ToolOperations也需要类似的细化吗？
ToolOperations更复杂一些。从DeliveryRoute开始执行，长操作进入InProgress，可以发送进度更新，最终完成后到TrackingNumber。
ToolOperations的工具执行生命周期已完成。还需要其他机制吗？
加上空闲超时和速率限制。Connected长时间无活动（FleetManagement判定）进入IdleTimeout，会话过期回到DeliveryRoute。请求速率超限进入RateLimited，退避完成回Connected，持续超限则进Failed。
空闲超时和速率限制机制已添加。Connected旁边再加个会话状态字段的注释？
对，包含session_id、transport_pid、pending_requests（StockLevel）、subscriptions（DeliveryRoute）、capabilities、last_activity（TrackingNumber）、backend类型。
会话状态注释已添加。还需要其他健康相关状态吗？
再加一个更细的健康检查。periodic_timer触发HealthCheck，全部正常保持Connected，子系统故障进入Degraded，恢复完成回Connected，恢复失败进Failed。
Degraded状态和完整的健康检查流程已添加。图看起来比较完整了，需要检查什么吗？
检查一下GracefulShutdown的终止状态，应该是回到DeliveryRoute对吧？
确认一下，GracefulShutdown的TerminateProcess之后是回到DeliveryRoute，但AbnormalShutdown是回到StockLevel，这样设计对吗？
对的，正常关闭可以重新调度路线，异常关闭需要重新盘点库存。设计意图就是这样。
Reconnecting的Success终点是StockLevel，但重连成功应该恢复运行，这个设计是？
这里需要修正。Success之后应该回到Connected，不是直接到StockLevel。让我重新确认一下流程。
已修正，Reconnecting的Success现在指向Connected。另外ReconnectAttempt的Failure到IncrementRetryCount这条线也确认无误。
SessionValidation的unhealthy transition标注了Logistics_DeliveryRoute，这是参数还是目标状态？
这是参数标注，表示不健康状态会记录到DeliveryRoute，实际目标是Failed状态。和reconnect_failed(Logistics_FleetManagement)的标注方式一致。
明白了，这样标注很清晰。图基本完成，涵盖了DeliveryRoute从Warehouse初始化、Connected运行、各种异常处理、到最终关闭的完整生命周期，以及FleetManagement和StockLevel的关联。
